description: This week's Solana Changelog covers a vote credit proposal aimed at incentivizing quick voting among validators, reducing compute costs for Curve 25519 operations, and introducing Seahorse v2 with enhanced Python support.
topic_summary: Highlights include a proposal for vote credits to encourage low latency voting [t=11:28], reduced compute costs for Curve 25519 operations [t=113:28], and the release of Seahorse v2 with improved Python features [t=253:48].
